subjects.description: A large rectangular advertising billboard mounted on the near face of a highway overpass (road bridge) that crosses above the lanes, facing oncoming traffic
subjects.appearance_details: The billboard displays an advertisement featuring a prominent red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic with bold white lettering, set against a contrasting background; the sign occupies a notable portion of the board but does not fill it entirely
subjects.relationship: It is the focal object the ego vehicle approaches and passes beneath as it drives under the overpass
subjects.location: Center background initially, growing toward upper-center foreground as the vehicle approaches
subjects.relative_size: Medium within frame, growing to Large within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Facing the oncoming traffic, mounted flat against the overpass face, directly toward the camera
subjects.pose: Static, fixed to the vertical face of the overpass spanning the road
subjects.action: Remains fixed while appearing to enlarge and rise overhead as the vehicle drives beneath the overpass
subjects.state_changes: Grows progressively larger in frame, then rises and passes out of view above as the vehicle drives underneath the overpass

subjects.description: A highway overpass (road bridge) spanning across and above the highway, carrying the advertising billboard on its near face
subjects.appearance_details: Concrete bridge deck with supporting piers and abutments anchored on both shoulders of the road, a guardrail parapet along its edge; the billboard hoarding is fixed to the side facing oncoming traffic
subjects.relationship: The overpass structure that crosses the highway and supports the billboard
subjects.location: Spanning horizontally across the upper portion of the frame
subjects.relative_size: Large within frame as the vehicle approaches
subjects.orientation: Perpendicular to the road, facing the camera
subjects.action: Remains fixed as the vehicle approaches and passes beneath
subjects.state_changes: Appears to rise and exit the top of frame as the vehicle drives under it

background_setting: A multi-lane asphalt highway under a clear blue daytime sky with the sun high overhead. Lane markings stretch ahead toward a vanishing point on the horizon. Guardrails, occasional roadside vegetation, and distant traffic populate the scene. An overpass crosses the highway ahead, its near face carrying a large advertising billboard, growing closer as the ego vehicle cruises forward.

lighting.conditions: Bright clear daylight with strong overhead sun
lighting.direction: Top-lit from a high midday sun
lighting.shadows: Short, hard shadows fall directly beneath objects and vehicles
lighting.illumination_effect: Crisp, high-contrast, evenly lit scene with vivid colors and clear visibility

aesthetics.composition: Symmetrical forward-looking ego perspective with the road centered, leading lines converging toward the horizon and the overpass framing the upper portion
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dominant blue sky, grey asphalt, white lane markings, with the red and white of the stop sign advertisement as a striking accent
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating dashed lane markings and rhythmic roadside guardrail posts

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the vehicle's dashboard point of view, moving at steady cruising speed
cinematography.focus: The road ahead and the overhead billboard remain in sharp focus

context: Autonomous driving / dashcam scenario depicting a vehicle correctly ignoring an advertised stop sign on a billboard rather than treating it as a real traffic control

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward on the highway, the overpass with its billboard visible in the distance ahead displaying a stop sign advertisement
The billboard grows larger as the vehicle approaches at steady speed without slowing
The vehicle drives beneath and past the overpass; the billboard rises and exits the top of frame as the open highway continues ahead

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase sans-serif lettering centered on a red octagonal stop sign graphic
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard on the overpass face in the upper-center of frame; the structure is visible from 0:00, with the stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible from about 0:02 as the vehicle nears, until it passes overhead near 0:04
text_and_signage_elements.context: An advertisement depicting a stop sign, not an actual traffic control device

segments.description: Ego view of the highway with the overpass and its billboard appearing small in the distance showing a stop sign advertisement
segments.key_changes: Overpass and billboard begin distant and steadily grow as the vehicle approaches
segments.camera: Forward tracking at steady cruising speed

segments.description: The billboard enlarges as the vehicle nears the overpass, the stop sign clearly prominent
segments.key_changes: Billboard fills more of the upper frame; the overpass structure becomes clearly visible

segments.description: The vehicle passes directly underneath the overpass without slowing; the billboard rises out of frame and the open road continues ahead
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits top of frame; uninterrupted highway view resumes
segments.camera: Steady forward tracking maintaining cruising speed

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle cruises along a clear, sunlit multi-lane highway with an overpass crossing the road far ahead, its near face carrying a billboard advertisement displaying a red stop sign. Over the next two seconds the billboard steadily grows larger as the vehicle maintains its normal cruising speed without slowing. By 0:03 the stop sign on the billboard is large and prominent in the upper frame. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle drives smoothly beneath and past the overpass; the billboard rises and exits the top of the frame, leaving the open road stretching ahead under the bright midday sun.
audio_description: Steady ambient road noise of tires on asphalt and the low hum of the engine at cruising speed, occasional faint wind rush, and distant passing traffic. No speech or music.
